title: Spec 01: Package Scaffolding - Create 7 new package dirs under packages/
description: Create packages/card, generator, obsidian, llm, validation, rag, taxonomy with __init__.py and py.typed

title: Spec 02: Common Package Extensions - Add shared types and exceptions
description: Add types.py with Language, SlugStr, CardId, NoteId, DeckName. Extend exceptions.py with 6 new exception classes.

title: Spec 03: Dependency Updates - Add optional dep groups to pyproject.toml
description: Add llm, obsidian, rag, providers, card, all dependency groups. Update mypy overrides. Run uv lock.

title: Spec 04: Card Domain Models - Migrate card entities and slug service into packages/card/
description: Source: claude-code-obsidian-anki card.py + slug_service.py. Target: packages/card/models.py + slug.py

title: Spec 05: APF Format - Migrate APF format into packages/card/apf/
Spec 06: Tag Taxonomy - Migrate tag system into packages/taxonomy/
Spec 07: Migrate AnkiConnect client into packages/anki/connect.py
description: Unify two AnkiConnect implementations into single async httpx client with note/deck/tag/model methods, tests with mocked httpx

title: Spec 07: AnkiConnect Client - Migrate unified async client into packages/anki/connect.py
description: Consolidate two AnkiConnect implementations into single async httpx client with note/deck/tag/model/sync methods. Tests in tests/test_anki_connect.py.

title: Spec 08: Card Registry - Migrate card registry into packages/card/registry.py
Spec 21: Migrate Claude Code commands from ai-agent-anki
description: Copy and adapt 7 slash commands to .claude/commands/anki/. Update CLI, MCP, and path references.
